notes: Stream-to-VOD pairing is by date between TwitchTracker's stream log and YouTube Live VODs; confident 1:1 matches only (8 of ~16 recent streams). YouTube live concurrent viewers are not public, so live reach understates by the YouTube live audience. Twitch VODs expire, so YouTube holds the durable archive. A 0.5h stream live at capture time (2026-07-21) was excluded.
